_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO. This egg has been manually extended with Java version selection, Gradle/Maven build support, and Java 25 runtime support. Modify only if you understand build pipelines and runtime execution behavior.
name: Generic Java (Gradle + Maven + Multi-Version)
author: sneaky@sneakyhub.com
description: Runs Java applications with support for Gradle, Maven, or direct JAR execution and selectable Java versions (8–25).
startup:
if [[ "{{AUTO_UPDATE}}" == "1" ]] && [[ -d .git ]]; then git pull; fi; cd /mnt/server; 

if [[ -f build.gradle ]]; then
    echo "Detected Gradle project"
    ./gradlew build || gradle build
    java -jar build/libs/*.jar
elif [[ -f pom.xml ]]; then
    echo "Detected Maven project"
    mvn package
    java -jar target/*.jar
else
    echo "Running direct JAR"
    java -Dterminal.jline=false -Dterminal.ansi=true -jar {{JARFILE}}
fi

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Java + Build Tools Installation Script
# Server Files: /mnt/server

apt update
apt install -y curl jq git unzip wget
apt install -y openjdk-21-jdk maven gradle

cd /mnt/server

echo "Installation complete"

variables.name: JAR FILE
variables.description: Used if no build system is detected

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull latest git repo on startup
